subject: A green-skinned Namekian warrior lunges forward in a fighting stance, surrounded by electric energy and a golden power blast at his feet
description: A muscular green-skinned humanoid figure with distinctive Namekian antenna-like head ridges lunges dynamically toward the viewer in a wide fighting stance. The figure wears a white gi with dark belt, fists raised. A burst of golden-yellow energy erupts at the figure's feet and lower body, suggesting a launch or power charge. Blue-white electric energy crackles at the edges of the frame. The face is set in a determined, focused expression with visible teeth. The high-resolution image allows clear detail: the figure's green skin, ridged Namekian cranial structure, and white fighting garment are all unambiguous. The composition is a mid-shot with strong diagonal energy through the figure's forward lunge.
foreground: green-skinned Namekian in white gi, lunging forward with fists raised
background: electric-blue energy crackles and gold power burst at lower frame
emotion: fierce determination — jaw set, forward charge, visible teeth
